/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -O0 -g3 -g -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T "/home/rolando/Documents/real_Time/Projects/P2_BlackPill/STM32F411CEUx_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=P2_BlackPill.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--start-group -lc -lm
